{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Imperial clan
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Imperial clan]] may not be happy about the demonstration of [[Blackflame]] powers in public.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Imperial clan]] is an entity the [[Deepwalker Ape]] swore revenge against.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
